title: Update branch ruleset required checks after dropping Python 3.9

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Investigating stale required status check for python 3.9 on PR after CI matrix was updated to 3.10-3.12.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Root cause confirmed in ruleset main-branch-protection (ID 13256471): required status checks still included check (py 3.9). Updated ruleset via GitHub API to require only check (py 3.10), check (py 3.11), check (py 3.12).
